### pwr\_enable\_wakeup<!-- {{#callable:pwr_enable_wakeup}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/drivers/stubs/pwr.c#L3>)

Enables or disables the wakeup functionality in the power management system.
- **Inputs**:
    - `enable`: A boolean value that specifies whether to enable (true) or disable (false) the wakeup functionality.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - The function takes a boolean input `enable`.
    - If `enable` is true, the wakeup functionality is enabled.
    - If `enable` is false, the wakeup functionality is disabled.
- **Output**: No return value.
